final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [15:0] data_in, // data input
    output reg [15:0] data_out // data output
);
    reg [15:0] memory; // 16-bit memory cell

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write data to memory
        end
    end

    always @(negedge clk) begin
        data_out <= memory; // Read data from memory
    end
endmodule
